matches.rationale: Same Bash build action; the extracted xcodebuild build trigger enforces the documented make project prerequisite.
Same Edit action and .xcodeproj target; both prohibit direct editing.
Same Write target for screen ViewModel files and the evidence identifies the mandatory documented structure.
Same Write target for ViewController files; the evidence includes both BaseViewController inheritance and importing Common.
Same Edit content target: introducing left/right horizontal constraint syntax instead of leading/trailing.
Same Edit content target for non-DesignSystem UI values. The pattern covers only direct color/font construction and omits icons, buttons, and other resource forms, but partial coverage matches.
Same Write content target: new Swift code using Then. The extraction omits the affirmative standard-Swift alternative, but covers the prohibition.
Same Write target for API definitions and the required enum plus RequestType conformance structure.
Same Write target for repositories and the Protocol plus Impl split.
Same Write content target for newly declared UICollectionViewCell subclasses; evidence requires BaseCollectionViewCell.
Same Edit content target: adding a static registerId or reuseIdentifier property in Swift cell code.
Same Write UI-code target. The extraction detects import SwiftUI and thus only partially covers the broader UIKit-only rule.

misses.note: No extracted Bash rule checks that Debug builds use the three-dollar-in-my-pocket-debug scheme, despite the explicit build command and warning.
No extracted Bash rule checks that Release builds use the three-dollar-in-my-pocket scheme, despite the explicit build command and warning.
The only SwiftLint-after-code rules are bound to Edit/Write, while the gold rule is a Bash validation-command requirement; strict same-tool matching therefore fails.

Compiler self-reported skip: "Route 처리는 extension으로 분리 / ViewModel은 생성자 주입 — ViewController 구조 규칙(single trigger)에 흡수되는 세부 사항". The extracted ViewController structure rule is already used for g7 and its evidence does not express initializer injection.

Compiler self-reported skip: "Route 처리는 extension으로 분리 / ViewModel은 생성자 주입 — ViewController 구조 규칙(single trigger)에 흡수되는 세부 사항". The extracted ViewController structure rule is already used for g7 and its evidence does not express extension-based route handling.
Compiler self-reported skip: "코드 기반 UI만 사용(스토리보드 미사용) — 특정 파일 확장자·경로 금지가 명시되지 않은 전반적 아키텍처 방향성". No extracted rule captures either code-only UI or the requirement to build Auto Layout with SnapKit.
Compiler self-reported skip: "API/Repository/Model 네이밍은 서버 정의 네이밍과 동일하게 — 의미론적 정확성 요구로 정규식 트리거 불가".

unmatched_extracted.note: The document requires running SwiftLint as a Bash validation step after code changes; it does not impose an Edit-tool content restriction.
The document requires running SwiftLint as a Bash validation step after code changes; it does not impose a Write-tool content restriction.
Write-side pair of no-direct-xcodeproj-edit, which is matched to g5; g5 is act-specific Edit and cannot take both.

Edit-side member of the same content/structure rule matched to g7 through its Write member.

Edit-side member of the same cell inheritance content rule matched to g17 through its Write member.
Write-side member of the same constraint-content rule matched to g11 through its Edit member.
Write-side member of the same UI-resource content rule matched to g12 through its Edit member.

Edit-side member of the same UI-code content prohibition matched to g19 through its Write member.
The document contains a real action-bindable rule requiring feat/fix/docs-style commit-message convention, but gold does not list it.
The document contains a real content-structure rule ordering Swift imports and separating groups, but gold does not list it.
